steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank fills 'making ______ the first time the organization would appoint a Vietnamese leader.' The pronoun refers back to the singular, specific event of Lê Lư&417;ng Minh becoming secretary-general in January 2013.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'these': plural demonstrative; the event is singular. ✗
  • Choice B — 'those': plural demonstrative; same problem. ✗
  • Choice C — 'this': singular demonstrative pointing back to the specific appointment just described. Substitution — 'making this the first time...' — reads naturally. ✓
  • Choice D — 'some': indefinite pronoun implying an unspecified quantity; the appointment is a defined singular event. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
